name: Stuffed Pumpkin
recipeIngredient: 1 pumpkin, sliced open as for a jack-o'-lantern
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the pumpkin and slice off the top as you would for a jack-o'-lantern.
2. Scoop out the seeds and rinse inside of the pumpkin.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet and saute onions, garlic, celery, green pepper, and mushrooms for 10 minutes.
4. Combine the cooked vegetables with the remaining ingredients (rice, spinach, herbs) and place the mixture into the pumpkin.
5. Replace the lid so it is not tightly sealed.
6. Bake at 350°F in a baking dish with 1 inch of water for approximately 1 1/2 hours, or until the pumpkin flesh is soft.
